titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Stonewall 25 celebrations memorabilia, 1994.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Stonewall 25 Celebrations Memorabilia,1994
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2003 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Memorabilia, broadsides, photographs, and other ephemeral material from the official and alternative Stonewall 25 marches and associated cultural festival, June 25-26, 1994. Also, the video "Stonewall 25: the future is ours!," a Lefthand production for Stonewall, Inc.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Memorabilia, broadsides, photographs, and other ephemeral material from the official and alternative Stonewall 25 marches and associated cultural festival, June 25-26, 1994. Also, the video "Stonewall 25: the future is ours!," a Lefthand production for Stonewall, Inc.

did.unittitle: Memorabilia, broadsides, photographs, and other ephemeral material

odd.p: Online container list not yet available.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Stonewall 25 celebrations memorabilia, #7587. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
